GLOBAL CUISINE — MENU
GLOBAL CUISINE
This is the page description.
OpenTable Diners’ Choice Award WINNERS SIX YEARS STRAIGHT
WELCOME TO
JAMAICA!
The "Visa" section is our rotating menu of global cuisine.
Every 90 days a lucky guest literally SPINS THE GLOBE and selects a random country. Chef Lin then creates an exciting menu full of delicacies
from the chosen nation.
These items are here for a short 3 month spell...
only to be replaced with a new exotic destination. - Enjoy!

CRAFT COCKTAILS — MENU
CRAFT COCKTAILS
Craft Cocktails
...are cocktails where every ingredient is handmade or tailored specifically to the drink. We are focusing on flavor, with high quality items and taking our time in order to do those ingredients justice.
Many claim they ‘craft’....we truly do.
“we are merely striving to be one of Atlantas best.”
Beverage Director - Josh Wheeler
—    Craft  Cocktails INSPIRED BY JAMAICA  $16 —
Some Ting Special
Hamilton Black Rum    +    Lime Juice    +    Donn's Licor       +       Fruitful Grapefruit Liquor    +    Angostura Amaro
Honey Ryder
Gold Rum  +  Pisco  +   Lime Juice  +  Honey Biz        +        Vanilla Syrup  +  Passion Fruit Honey
Rude Boy
Smith and Cross   +  Edmunds Honor Bourbon     +    Carpano Antica Sweet Vermouth    +   Demerara syrup
Giffard Banane du Brasil   +  Jerk Bitters   +    Angostura Amaro
Bhom Bhom
Wray and Nephew Over Proof Rum  +    Sorel Liquor      +      Lemon Juice     +   Demerara     +   Hibiscus Syrup
Amaro All Spice    +   St Agrestis Amaro     +   All Spice Dram    +    Scotch Bonnett Infusion
—  RESIDENT  COCKTAILS    $16 —
The Consulate Elixir
(Reconstructed ‘Modern’ Old-Fashioned)
Four Roses Yellow Label Bourbon     +      Giffard Creme de Peche     +    Mint  +  Bitter Trio    +  Citrus Oils
Oddjobs Punch
Elijah Craig Small Batch Bourbon    +    lemongrass Ginger syrup    +     Lemon  +  China-China  +    St. Germain
Second Death
Del Maguey Vida de Muertos  +   Nyak VS
Watershed Barrel Finished Nocino  +  Maraska Nocelino
